examples: He had developed a fearsome reputation for intimidating people.
At the state level their influence can be even more fearsome.
The manticore is the most fearsome of Pandoran predators, and by the look, it might be the toughest carnivore in the known universe.
She is befriended by a kindly teacher but opposed by the fearsome school headmistress.
The plague of lists has grown much more fearsome in the age of the Internet.
